description: Explore and produce a plan document at docs/c11mux-theming-plan.md for a unified theme engine that covers all c11mux chrome surfaces (sidebar, top bar, tab bar, dividers, outer workspace frame) while leaving Ghostty-owned surfaces untouched. Plan must cover current-state audit, workspace color audit, schema design, divider/frame primitives, migration, UX, phased rollout, non-goals, open questions, risks.
title: Custom theming system plan
